title: DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Defence Institute of High Altitude Research (DRDO DIHAR)
short_info: Defence Institute of High Altitude Research (DRDO DIHAR) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech students pursuing engineering degree (7th/8th Semester)
qualification.details: BE/B.Tech students pursuing an engineering degree (7th/8th Semester) in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute with ≥7.5 CGPA or equivalent continuously maintained in all previous semesters from AICTE/UGC approved universities/institutes.

selection_process: Selection based on marks scored in previous exams and online/telephonic interview/interaction as required Merit basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be BE/B.Tech students pursuing their 7th or 8th semester with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 from a recognized Indian University/Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the internship?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on academic merit and performance in an online or telephonic interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The internship is scheduled to start on 01-07-2026. Specific duration details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which engineering disciplines are eligible for this internship?
faq.answer: Eligible disciplines include Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics & Instrumentation, Electronics & Communication, Computer Science, Information Technology, and Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Defence Institute of High Altitude Research located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Leh, Ladakh, with the pincode 901205.

faq.question: Q10. How should I send my application?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email with all required documents attached. Ensure to mention the post applied for in the subject line.
